chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-28 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 07-02-2018 Syed Shafique Ahmed Shah advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad, SIP Najamdin Nizamani on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Pahardin Dahani PS Hatri. Syed Meeral Shah Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Respondent No.7 present in person files parawise comments taken on record. Learned A.A.G. files comments of respondents No.3 to 6, taken on record. Copy whereof supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. It has been pointed out by learned A.A.G. Sindh that crime No.109 / 2017 of PS Hatri has already been challaned before the competent Court. When confronted this fact to learned counsel for the petitioner, who submits that he would confine his relief only to the protection of the life and property of the petitioner. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of as not pressed. However, official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
